title: Psychic Handbook
body:
# Psychic Handbook

Denver-area band/project mentioned in remix-project coverage as one of the "alumni bands" who donated raw tracks for remix compilations. Confidence is medium — concrete bio details (members, releases) remain thin.

## Connection to Colin

Track 9 of REMIX10: **"PSYCHIC HANDBOOK-CRYSTAL DRIP (isle of the tiger mix)"** — Colin's remix of "Crystal Drip."
